elevation.description: Tests the sun's elevation against a threshold you set.
elevation.name: Sun elevation

is_ascending.description: Tests if the sun is ascending.
is_ascending.name: Sun is ascending

is_descending.description: Tests if the sun is descending.
is_descending.name: Sun is descending

is_evening_twilight.description: Tests if it is evening twilight, optionally of a specific type.
is_evening_twilight.name: It is evening twilight

is_morning_twilight.description: Tests if it is morning twilight, optionally of a specific type.
is_morning_twilight.name: It is morning twilight

is_set.description: Tests if the sun is set.
is_set.name: Sun is set

is_up.description: Tests if the sun is up.
is_up.name: Sun is up

end_before_start.message: The end of the requested time range must be after its start.

too_many_positions.message: The requested time range and interval would return {requested} positions; the maximum is {limit}. Use a shorter range or a larger interval.

get_positions.description: Retrieves the solar azimuth and elevation over a time range.

duration.description: Length of the time range from the start. Cannot be used together with 'End time'.
duration.name: Duration

end_date_time.description: End of the time range. Cannot be used together with 'Duration'. Defaults to 24 hours after the start.
end_date_time.name: End time

interval.description: Time between two returned positions. Defaults to 5 minutes.
interval.name: Interval

start_date_time.description: Start of the time range. Defaults to now.
start_date_time.name: Start time

get_positions.name: Get positions

dawn.description: Triggers at dawn, when civil, nautical, or astronomical twilight begins.
dawn.name: Dawn

dusk.description: Triggers at dusk, when civil, nautical, or astronomical twilight ends.
dusk.name: Dusk

elevation_changed.description: Triggers whenever the sun's elevation changes, optionally limited to a threshold or range you set.
elevation_changed.name: Sun elevation changed

elevation_crossed_threshold.description: Triggers when the sun's elevation crosses a threshold you set.
elevation_crossed_threshold.name: Sun elevation crossed threshold

solar_midnight.description: Triggers when the sun reaches its lowest point.
solar_midnight.name: Solar midnight

solar_noon.description: Triggers when the sun reaches its highest point.
solar_noon.name: Solar noon
